recommendations.title: Retroactive
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Thriller, Action, Crime, Drama, Adventure
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist makes multiple trips through time to save a woman that was murdered by her brutal husband.

recommendations.title: Werewolf: The Beast Among Us
recommendations.overview: Set in a 19th century village, a young man studying under a local doctor joins a team of hunters on the trail of a wolf-like creature.

recommendations.title: The Hitcher II: I've Been Waiting
recommendations.overview: A sadistic serial killer terrorizes a couple driving on a rural highway in Texas while killing numerous people and framing them for his killings.

recommendations.title: Joy Ride 2: Dead Ahead

recommendations.title: Resident Evil: Degeneration
recommendations.overview: Leon S. Kennedy and Claire Redfield must battle a rogue warrior seeking revenge after unleashing the deadly G-Virus, whilst a mutated monster goes on a rampage.

recommendations.title: Aztec Batman: Clash of Empires

recommendations.title: Pin

recommendations.title: Man's Best Friend
recommendations.overview: A genetic research facility worker exposes animal abuses there to a local TV reporter, who frees and takes in a genetically altered dog from the lab, unaware that he has a violent streak.

recommendations.title: Resident Evil: Damnation

recommendations.title: Resident Evil: Vendetta
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Adventure, Science Fiction, Horror
recommendations.overview: When a fearless enemy out for revenge unleashes a brutal and deadly new virus, BSAA captain Chris Redfield enlists the help of Agent Leon S. Kennedy and Professor Rebecca Chambers to bring down the death merchant and save New York City.
